q: When you catch your partner staring at you:
options: They smile and look away shyly
They overthink whether you noticed
They say 'just making sure you're okay'
They pretend they weren't looking
They try to fix it before you even know
They replay every scenario at 3am
They ask if you're safe first, deal with themselves later
They say 'I'm fine' and change the subject
A photo of you they think you don't know about
Something aesthetic they chose after way too much thought
Family or something meaningful
Default — they don't do sentimental (or so they say)
They text 'tonight was perfect' before you're even home
They replay every moment wondering if they said something weird
They walk slow on purpose to make the night last longer
They act casual but you can tell they're buzzing inside
Feel deeply and need to express it to someone
Feel deeply but spiral trying to understand it alone
Feel deeply but channel it into protecting others
Feel deeply but lock it in a vault

q: The thing they'd never say out loud:
options: How much they've imagined a future with you
How scared they are of messing this up
How much responsibility they put on themselves for your happiness
How much they wish they could let their guard down

q: When they see a couple in a movie doing something romantic:
options: They secretly want that and file it away for later
They wonder if you'd think it's cheesy
They think about how they'd make you feel that safe
They roll their eyes but you catch a micro-smile

q: Their biggest unspoken fear in your relationship:
options: That they'll never be romantic enough for you
That they're reading everything wrong
That they can't protect you from everything
That if they open up fully, you'll leave

q: The way they sleep next to you:
options: Facing you, arm around you, as close as possible
Tossing and turning — their brain doesn't stop
Between you and the door — always
On their side, back turned but hand reaching yours

q: If they could tell you one truth:
options: 'I've loved you longer than you think'
'I overthink everything because I don't want to lose you'
'I'd carry every hard thing so you never have to'
'I want to let you in but I don't know how'
